risk_description: Training data reflects historical hiring that was 68% male in engineering. Without mitigation the model may systematically rank female candidates lower in technical roles.
controls_in_place: Disparate impact testing pre-go-live (4/5ths rule); exclude photo and DOB from features; quarterly bias re-test

risk_description: TalentRank.ai is a Series B startup. Going concern risk. No clear data return / model portability clause in current contract.
controls_in_place: Vendor AI addendum (in negotiation); escrow of model weights; documented manual fallback process

risk_description: Candidates are not informed their CV is scored by AI. Violates EU AI Act Art. 13 and GDPR Art. 13/22 right to information.
controls_in_place: Update careers portal privacy notice; add AI disclosure banner; provide GDPR Art. 22 human-review route

risk_description: Candidate data from UAE flows to AWS Bahrain (vendor tenancy) and US-based vendor support. UAE PDPL Art. 22 cross-border transfer needs lawful basis.
controls_in_place: Standard Contractual Clauses; UAE Data Office adequacy assessment; data minimisation

risk_description: If recruiters defer to AI ranking without independent judgement human oversight becomes nominal and EU AI Act Art. 14 is breached.
controls_in_place: Recruiter training; monthly override rate KPI with 10% floor; ARC escalation if breached two periods in a row
